name: Melissa LeEllen
bio: Melissa LeEllen Biondi is an actress, model, producer and entrepreneur originally from a small town in South Carolina who developed her outdoor skills backpacking in the North Georgia Mountains and training at the Big Pig Outdoors Center in Tennessee. She survived 21 days in the Panamanian jungle on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and is the founder of Creative Global Branding. See her personal site.

name: Melissa Miller
bio: Melissa Miller, known as Melissa Backwoods, is a survivalist from Fenton, Michigan who has completed three challenges on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}: the Amazon jungle, the South African Selati Basin (40 days), and the Florida swamplands. She is a traditional bowhunter skilled in primitive trapping, shelter making and foraging, and works as an environmental educator and as social media/digital marketing director for BLADE Magazine.

name: Michael Angulo
bio: Michael Angulo is a fishing boat captain who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Kalahari Cold Front}}, attempting to survive 21 days in South Africa's Kalahari Desert with partner Jaclin Owen. The episode aired in March 2023 as part of Season 15.

name: Michael Dietrich
bio: Michael Dietrich is a personal fitness trainer and outdoorsman from Edmonton, Alberta who survived and won {{ep:Two Tarzans, One Jane}} on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2020, lasting 21 days in the Colombian jungle. Producers recruited him after seeing his Instagram photos hiking the Alberta mountains with his dog BearBear.

name: Michael Jefferson
bio: Michael Jefferson is a Marysville, Washington native and banker at First Tech Federal Credit Union in Bellevue. A former Survivor: One World contestant, he later appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Botswana Breakdown}}, where he was paired with a Rhode Island bartender for a 21-day challenge in Botswana.

name: Michaelyn Ritchie
bio: Michaelyn Ritchie (Grist) appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2022 as a self-survivalist in {{ep:Legends and Rookies}}, filmed in the Nama Karoo region of South Africa.

name: Michelle Etchings
bio: Michelle Etchings is an Air Force veteran from Colorado who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Curse of the Swamp}} in 2017, paired with returning hunter Jeremy McCaa in the mosquito-ridden swamps of Louisiana.

name: Mike Douglas
bio: Mike Douglas is the founder of Maine Primitive Skills School in Augusta, Maine, where he has taught wilderness skills since 1989. He survived the full 21 days on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Philippine jungle after his partner had to be medevacked, and works as a Maine guide teaching foraging, tracking and fire-making. See Maine Primitive.

name: Mike Morency
bio: Mike Morency appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} as a survivalist in {{ep:Don't Cave In}}, which aired in May 2020 and featured him and partner Jessica attempting a challenge in the Colombian jungle.

name: Milo Miller
bio: Milo Miller is a former Amish digital creator who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in Season 17's {{ep:Naked and Amish}}, surviving 21 days in the Colombian jungle with Australian fitness coach Alexa Towersey. He shares his post-Amish life on social media.

name: Miranda Adams
bio: Miranda Adams is a USCG-licensed captain and two-time {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist based in Crystal River, Florida, where she runs Native Salt Fishing Charters through Miranda Adams Outdoors. She specializes in saltwater fishing, the outdoors and primitive survival.

name: Molly Cowles
bio: Molly Cowles is a self-described superfan who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2020's {{ep:Amazoned Out}}, dropped into the Ecuadorian Amazon rainforest with fellow superfan Nate Cook to endure torrential rain, bugs and extreme sleep deprivation.

name: Molly Daley
bio: Molly Daley (Henderson) is a wilderness EMT and performance breathing coach who runs Wilderwell and appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Opposites Don't Attract}} (Season 14, 2022), where she partnered with homesteader Nathan Olesen in a coastal Colombian jungle.

name: Molly Jansen
bio: Molly Jansen is a Denver-based criminal defense attorney who runs Molly Jansen Law Group and earned her J.D. from the University of Denver Sturm College of Law. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Stomping Grounds}} (Season 10, 2019) as a novice survivalist in South Africa's Limpopo Basin, and works as a motivational speaker and radio legal commentator.

name: Monica Heim
bio: Monica Heim is an Alaska-based software engineer who earned a BS in Computer Science and Computer Engineering from the University of Alaska and previously worked at Apple in Silicon Valley. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2022's {{ep:Night Stalkers}}, teaming with wilderness guide Elijah Strongheart in the Botswana desert.

name: Morgan Reed
bio: Morgan Reed is a self-described superfan who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} (Season 11) in a 14-day fan-edition challenge on Andros Island in the Bahamas, paired with fellow fan Daren.

name: Mylaena Monks
bio: Mylaena Monks is an ICU trauma nurse from Seattle, Washington who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Blood and Money}}, the Season 16 premiere, taking on a 14-day fan challenge in the rugged Mexican jungle alongside a banker.

name: Na'im McKee
bio: Na'im McKee is a Cincinnati-based survivalist, experienced Boy Scout and endurance athlete who has completed more than 50 long-course races, a marathon and an Olympic triathlon. He appeared on Season 15 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Cry for Me, Argentina}} with partner Rachel in Argentina's Chaco Province, and later returned on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}}.

name: Nate Cook
bio: Nate Cook is a self-described die-hard survivalist and superfan who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Amazoned Out}} (2020), partnering with fellow superfan Molly Cowles in the Ecuadorian Amazon rainforest.

name: Nathan Martinez
bio: Nathan Martinez is a survivalist and experimental archaeology instructor who spent seven years teaching at an archaeological and foraging lifeways school in West Texas, and has consulted for Discovery's I, Caveman and Man vs. Wild. He completed 21 days in Brazil on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} (2019) and 40 days in Colombia on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} (2024), where he was featured as the show's first transgender, non-binary survivalist.

name: Nathan Olesen
bio: Nathan Olesen is a homesteader who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Opposites Don't Attract}} (Season 14, 2022), partnering with wilderness EMT Molly Daley in a coastal Colombian jungle.

name: Nicklas Lautakoski
bio: Nicklas Lautakoski is a Swedish adventurer, mountain guide and lecturer born in Katrineholm, Sweden, who has cycled from Portugal toward China and motorcycled from the northernmost point of Europe to the southernmost point of Africa. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Melt Down Under}}, surviving 21 days in the Australian Outback with Laura Thompson-Nelson.

name: Nicole Smith
bio: Nicole "Nikki" Smith is a pre-med student and adventure enthusiast who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in Season 14's {{ep:Lost in Translation}}, dropped into the South African bush for 21 days with partner Diogo De Souza.

name: Nicole Terry
bio: Nicole Terry is a nursing student from Hanover, Massachusetts and a Taekwondo black belt who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2016's {{ep:Bad Blood}}, partnering with Angel Rodriguez in the arid lakebeds of Nicaragua. She later returned for nine episodes of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in 2019.

name: Noa Beck
bio: Noa Taylor Beck is a life skills coach and photographer based in Asheville, North Carolina who grew up in Georgia and is studying to become a counselor and therapist. A Rocky Mountain Youth Corps alumna, she appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2024's {{ep:Mayan Blood Sacrifice}}, completing a 21-day challenge.

name: Noah Mattes
bio: Noah Mattes is a Bozeman, Montana-based outdoorsman, house painter and improv comedy monologist who pursues deep snow, rock climbing and the outdoors. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2022's {{ep:Legends and Rookies}}, surviving 21 days in the South African bush with legend Matt Wright.

name: Omar Barney
bio: Omar Barney is a reality TV personality and stand-up comedian who has appeared twice as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, including a Season 15 14-day fan challenge in the jungles of Colombia with Raven Smith, and a return in Season 18's {{ep:Three Is Not Enough}} in the Belizean jungle.

name: Paolo Digiralomo
bio: Paolo Di Girolamo is a Pittsfield, Massachusetts native and Stoughton, Massachusetts resident who works as a neurological specialist. He graduated from Taconic High School in 2006 and Westfield State University in 2010, and appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2015, partnering with Kristin Young in a remote region of Nicaragua.

name: Patrick French
bio: Patrick French, known as Dosu Kinuta, is a New Hampshire native, professional outdoor athlete and Triple Crown thru-hiker who has logged more than 21,000 thru-hiking miles across 23 different trails. He survived 21 days in a swampy Argentine savannah on Season 15 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, and has returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}}. See his personal site.

name: Phaedra Brothers
bio: Phaedra Brothers is a Utah-raised survivalist who grew up off-grid without running water, electricity or modern conveniences, living mostly in tents. She first appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in Season 3's {{ep:Himalayan Hell}}, paired with Hakim Isler in northern India, and has returned for additional episodes including {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Puma Cabra
bio: Puma Cabra (born Shawn Plummer) is an expert outdoorsman, tattoo artist and snowboarder from Nevada. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} during the show's early seasons starting in 2013, including the {{ep:Breaking Borneo}} challenge in Sabah, Borneo.

name: Quince Mountain
bio: Quince Mountain is a writer and dog musher based in Mountain, Wisconsin, where he lives with his wife, author and musher Blair Braverman. He was the first openly transgender competitor on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, appearing in 2019, and later became the first openly trans musher to run the Iditarod. He has written for the New York Times and Outside about gender, religion and the outdoors, and co-authored the book Dogs on the Trail.

name: Rachel Caroline Strohl
bio: Rachel Caroline Strohl is an ocean advocate, freedive instructor and social media marketer from West Virginia. She first appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid of Love}} and returned to the franchise as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Argentina challenge {{ep:Cry for Me Argentina}}, then on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}}.

name: Raven Winter Smith
bio: Raven Smith is a Chicago-based survivalist and cannabis cultivator who works on an all-female farm. A longtime superfan of the show, she was applied on behalf of by a friend and appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in a 14-day Colombia fan challenge alongside Omar Barney.

name: Rebel Blalock
bio: Rebel Blalock is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2022 South Africa episode {{ep:Battle of the Sexes}}, in which two women and two men competed against each other to survive 21 days in big-cat country.

name: Rhonda Placourakis
bio: Rhonda Placourakis is a digital creator and fitness coach who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2021 episode {{ep:Okay, Boomer}}, in which she was paired with Joseph Nichter for a 21-day Sonoran Desert challenge along the Arizona-Mexico border.

name: Rizza Bagan
bio: Rizza Bagan is a Filipino-American actress, director and producer who says she is the first Filipino survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, appearing in the Season 14 episode {{ep:The Labyrinth}} in 2022. She maintains a personal website at rizzabagan.com.

name: Robin Barber
bio: Robin Barber is a U.S. Coast Guard nurse and doctoral student based in California who grew up in the rugged landscape of North Dakota. A military mom, she appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2015 episode {{ep:Garden of Evil}}, surviving in Mexico's Cayo Venado with Navy veteran Brandon Dix.

name: Robin Hill
bio: Robin Hill is an adventure chef who grew up in Montana in a restaurant family and runs Mountain Fresh Catering. His culinary work spans Denali mountaineering expeditions, Smith River fishing lodges and high-end dinners at the Yellowstone Club, and he has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}.

name: Rod Biggs
bio: Rod Biggs is a survivalist and outdoor educator from Douglass, Kansas. He has appeared multiple times on the franchise, including {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Biting Back at Africa}} (2020) and on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in 2022, describing himself as a three-time franchise survivalist.

name: Rose Godfrey
bio: Rose Godfrey is a Florida homesteader and small-business owner who runs One Healthy Planet LLC, focusing on environmental education. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2021 episode {{ep:Come Hell and Black Water}}, set in the black-water swamps of Florida.

name: Russell Sage
bio: Russell Sage is a survival instructor who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} starting in Season 1's {{ep:Double Jeopardy}} two-parter, and later returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Apocalypse}}. He and fellow survivalist Alana Barfield are considered the show's first couple.

name: Rusty Thomas
bio: Rusty Thomas, nicknamed "Zipline," is a survivalist associated with the Eureka Springs zipline operation in Arkansas. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2022 South Africa episode {{ep:Battle of the Sexes}}.

name: Ryan Eacret
bio: Ryan Eacret is a primitive hunter and survivalist from the small town of Keota in Haskell County, Oklahoma. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2020 South Africa episode at Limpokwena Natural Reserve and later on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, where producers asked him to leave after he showed signs of severe depression.

name: Ryan Holt
bio: Ryan Holt, known as "Yukon Yeti," is a Marine Corps Infantry veteran (2003-2011) with deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, and a registered Maine guide. He has competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} multiple times, and runs the Human Nature Hostel and the Wilderness Warrior Project, which leads veterans on healing hikes.

name: Rylie Parlett
bio: Rylie Parlett, known as "Bandit Queen," is a Southern Maryland-raised bushcraft instructor who left a career as a MAC makeup artist to pursue primitive skills, training at the North American Bushcraft School in West Virginia. She has competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} (21-day Honduras and 40-day Philippines challenges) and on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in Louisiana's Atchafalaya Basin.

name: Sabrina Mergenthaler
bio: Sabrina Mergenthaler is a Snellville, Georgia mother and outdoor adventurer who founded She Inspires Adventures, a platform empowering women to pursue solo outdoor travel. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2014 episode {{ep:Meltdown in Bolivia}}, where she stayed in the Bolivian jungle after her partner tapped out.

name: Sam Gerges
bio: Sam Gerges (Samantha Gerges) is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2021 episode {{ep:The Devil's Woods}}, paired with Joe Ortlip in the Montana wilderness amid bears and aggressive moose.

name: Sam Mouzer
bio: Sam Mouzer is a father of two from Quarry Bank in Dudley, England, who works as a mental health support worker after serving as a reconnaissance officer in the British Army. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2023 season opener {{ep:Welcome to America!}} alongside Survival Lilly in the Mojave Desert, and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in 2024.

name: Samantha Cline
bio: Samantha Cline is a Botetourt County, Virginia native based in Roanoke who founded Inward Survival Resilience Training and works as a real estate broker, while also serving on staff at the Southwest Virginia Wildlife Center. She appeared on Season 12 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Monkey Business}}, filmed on Namibia's Orange River.

name: Samantha Ohl
bio: Samantha Ohl is a U.S. Army veteran from Sharpsville, Pennsylvania who served six years with two deployments to Iraq and one to Afghanistan. A mother of four and an avid hunter, she was cast on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} after producers found her on social media and appeared in the 2017 episode {{ep:Stone Cold}}.

name: Samantha Pearson
bio: Samantha Pearson is a Texas-based single mother and personal trainer who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} starting with the 2014 Malaysian rainforest episode {{ep:The Pain Forest}} alongside firefighter Fernando Calderon, and later returned for additional franchise episodes.

name: Samantha Ray Moore
bio: Samantha Ray Moore is a photographer and union tradeswoman with Laborers Local 563. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2024 14-day Limpopo, South Africa episode {{ep:This is Harder Than it Looks}}.

name: Samuel Smith
bio: Samuel Smith is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2024 episode {{ep:Surviving the Road to Recovery}}, completing a 21-day challenge in South Africa alongside Sarah Barnett amid crocodiles, lions and venomous snakes.

name: Sara Burkett
bio: Sara Burkett is an adventurer and survivalist from Maryville, Tennessee with a background in long-distance hiking and primitive camping. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Seasons 10 and 11, including a Panama challenge, and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}: Frozen.

name: Sara Kunz
bio: Sara Kunz, dubbed "The Joyful Warrior" by Discovery, is a keynote speaker and facilitator with a Master's in Counseling Psychology who teaches resilience under pressure. A two-time {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist, she completed 35 days in the wild on the show while overcoming a broken spine and anxiety, and now speaks at companies and on campuses through sarakunz.com.

name: Sarah Barnett
bio: Sarah Barnett is an outdoor and survival enthusiast from Santa Rosa, California whom Discovery scouted through the online survival courses she teaches. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2024 episode {{ep:Surviving the Road to Recovery}}, completing a 21-day South Africa challenge with Sam Strong.

name: Sarah Bartell
bio: Sarah Bartell is a taxidermist, professional adventurer and four-time {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist originally from Portland, Oregon who now runs an off-grid homestead in Goldendale, Washington. She first appeared in the Season 10 Ecuadorian jungle challenge and crafts ornamental pieces from ethically sourced fur, leather and bones, which she sells through her Etsy shop.

name: Sarah Danser
bio: Sarah Danser was a master diver, boat captain and self-described "pirate" originally from Castle Rock, Colorado who had lived in Hawaii for roughly twelve years. She first appeared on the {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 8 premiere in 2017 as one of the show's first survivalists stranded at sea, and returned multiple times to {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}. She died at 34 in October 2024 following a car accident in Honolulu.

name: Sarah Salmond
bio: Sarah Salmond, known as "Tank Girl," is a U.S. Army veteran, certified firearms instructor and competitive 3-Gun shooter who teaches women confidence with firearms and vehicles. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2020 episode {{ep:Snow Daze}}.

name: Sarah Wiley
bio: Sarah Wiley is a North Carolina-based survivalist from Hubert who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2017. She and her partner Duck Campbell were dropped into the jungles of Belize for a 21-day challenge that aired in August 2017.

name: Scott Davis
bio: Scott Davis is a survivalist who has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} multiple times, including the episodes {{ep:Gag Me with a Turtle}} in 2021 and {{ep:Triple Threat}} in 2024.

name: Scott Thompson
bio: Scott Thompson is a recently retired military man from South Carolina who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Season 8 episode {{ep:Texan Torture}} (2017). Paired with McKenzie Clark, he survived 21 days in the Texas Hill Country and lost roughly 30 pounds during the challenge.

name: Sean McCool
bio: Sean McCool is a U.S. Marine Corps officer and combat engineer who deployed twice to Iraq. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2023 episode {{ep:Sucker Punched in South Africa}}, surviving 21 days in the South African bush. He is the son of the late astronaut Willie McCool, pilot of the Space Shuttle Columbia.

name: Serena Shine
bio: Serena Shine is one half of New Zealand's adventuring duo The Wild Twins with her sister Amber, and has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} since 2019. She owns and operates Glam Camping at Castaways Resort in Waiuku, NZ, and co-authored the book The Wild Twins: Tales of Strength and Survival.

name: Seth Reece
bio: Seth Reece is a survivalist who first appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2019 episode {{ep:No Safety in Numbers}}, filmed in Panama. He returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} Season 6, lasting beyond 21 days but falling short of the full 40.

name: Shane Bulloch
bio: Shane Bulloch is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2019 episode {{ep:Feel the Burn}}, dropped into Guyana's scorching savannah to battle oppressive heat and relentless insects. He has also competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Shane Lewis
bio: Shane Lewis is a traveler and survivalist who has visited more than 70 countries and is a licensed electrician of over a decade. He was among the early survivalists on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} (debuting in 2014's {{ep:Naked and Awkward}}) and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and its All Stars season. He has since pursued acting and authored the book Growing Up: Institutionalized To Globetrotting.

name: Shanika Malcolm
bio: Shanika Malcolm is a Jamaican-born wellness coach based in Philadelphia who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2022 episode {{ep:Curse of the Chiapas}}. She became the first Black woman to complete the 21-day challenge in the Mexican jungle and later returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid: Solo}}.

name: Shannon Kulpa
bio: Shannon "Tarzana" Kulpa is a survivalist based in Ogden, Utah, who runs surf-and-survival adventures in Latin America under the Camp Tarzana banner. She first appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2017 episode {{ep:Hangry}} and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Shannon Thomas
bio: Shannon Thomas is a yoga teacher, health coach and founder of Open Way Yoga who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2014 during a 21-day challenge in Belize. She holds a health coach certification from the Institute for Integrative Nutrition and incorporates her wilderness experience into trauma-informed yoga workshops.

name: Shaun Harvey
bio: Shaun Harvey is a survivalist and bowhunter who runs Harvey Archery and appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2022 episodes {{ep:Brother's Keeper}} and {{ep:Sibling Survival}} alongside his brother Warrick.

name: Shawn Brestschneider
bio: Shawn Bretschneider is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Season 18 episode {{ep:Mayan Blood Sacrifice}}. His brother Chad Bretschneider has also competed on the show.

name: Shell Armogida
bio: Shell (Michelle) Armogida is a Florida-based farmer, U.S. Air Force veteran and real estate broker with a prior career in aviation and aerospace project management. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2024, surviving 21 days in South Africa with partner Cole Wilks before continuing into a {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} 40-day stay.

name: Sherean Rogouski
bio: Sherean Rogouski is a survivalist from Anacortes, Washington who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2020 episode {{ep:Naked and Ghosted}}. She is married to fellow survivalist Sean McCool.

name: Skye Selene
bio: Skye Selene is a survival instructor, retreat leader, and founder of ReWilding Women who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2025 episode {{ep:Schooled by the Jungle}}. She took on a 21-day challenge in the Philippine jungle but was medevacked out due to illness before completing the run.

name: Stacey Osorio
bio: Stacey Osorio is a wildlife biology researcher, podcaster and founder of Inward Survival who has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, competing in Croatia and South Africa. She hosts the Fringe with Benefits podcast under the handle Golden Valkyrie.

name: Star Torres
bio: Star Torres is a U.S. Marine from Pocatello, Idaho who became part of the first real-life couple to compete together on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} when she and partner Tony Wheeler appeared in the 2019 episode {{ep:For Better or for a Lot Worse}}. They survived 21 days in the Guyana jungle.

name: Stephanie Beeson
bio: Stephanie Beeson is an outdoor adventurer and survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} as part of the Season 18 cast in 2025. She documents her wilderness experiences and outdoor adventures on social media.

name: Steve Hansen
bio: Steve Hansen is an actor and survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} across three episodes between 2015 and 2017. He has also worked in film, with credits including Sellout (2017) and Golden Age (2017).

name: Steven Lee Hall Jr
bio: Steven Lee Hall Jr. is a survivalist from Amarillo, Texas who was taught the craft by his father and grandfather, and has become one of the most-featured contestants across {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}. He is also a self-taught professional artist who paints under the name Nevets Killjoy.

name: Steven Townes
bio: Steven Townes is a Florida-based survivalist from Merritt Island who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2018, including the episode {{ep:Blindsided}}. He also stepped in as a replacement survivalist in a Yucatan jungle challenge in Mexico.

name: Suzanne Zeta
bio: Suzanne Zeta is a clinical researcher and healthcare executive from Ashland, Virginia who holds a BS in Occupational Therapy, an MBA, and a PhD in Health Related Sciences. She has competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} across 21-, 40- and 60-day challenges in the Amazon, South African savannah and Louisiana's Atchafalaya Basin.

name: Tanner Barclay
bio: Tanner Barclay is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2021 episode {{ep:The Death Ledge}}, joining Brittany Wallace and Aosha Wells in a three-person challenge along the coastal rainforest cliffs of Ecuador.

name: Tara Skubella
bio: Tara Skubella is a Colorado-based tantra guide and former wilderness therapy professional who graduated from Northwest Missouri State University and worked for the U.S. Forest Service. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2015 episode {{ep:The Swarm}}, filmed in the jungles of Panama's Isla San Jose.

name: Tawny Lynn
bio: Tawny Lynn is a shooter, model and tactical-firearms personality who appeared as a survivalist across two seasons of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in 2016. She now hosts the Blood & Breakthrough podcast.

name: Teal Bulthius
bio: Teal Bulthuis is a primitive skills practitioner and U.S. Air Force veteran who served as a Master Sergeant and instructor, raised on the North Shore of Massachusetts. She appeared on Season 9 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, completing a 21-day primitive challenge in the Smoky Mountains.

name: Terra Short
bio: Terra Short is a U.S. Air Force veteran, bowhunter, tattoo artist and Barebones Bushcraft instructor from Mobile, Alabama who made history as the first transgender woman to compete on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}. She has braved the wilds across {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid: Solo}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, including a full 21 days in Pia Manzi, Zambia.

name: Theresa Owens
bio: Threasa Owens is a Florida police officer who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2019 episode {{ep:Honduran Hell}}, completing a 21-day challenge in the Honduran jungle alongside partner Quince Mountain.

name: Thomas Virgets
bio: Thomas Virgets is an environmental engineer from the Baton Rouge, Louisiana area who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2020 episode {{ep:Twinning}} alongside his twin brother Warren. The brothers were the show's first sibling pair, surviving the South African savannah while stalked by rhinos, hyenas and a territorial leopard.

name: Tim Phillips
bio: Tim Phillips is a survivalist from Massillon, Ohio. He made his {{series:Naked and Afraid}} debut in 2020 and has since returned for multiple episodes of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Timothy Lair
bio: Timothy Lair is a former U.S. Marine and EMT firefighter based in Spring Hill, Florida. He survived 21 days in the Trinidad jungle on the {{ep:Hangry}} episode of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2017, battling stinging red ants and bubbling mud volcanoes. He also runs Lair Survival, offering beginner survival courses.

name: Tom McElroy
bio: Tom McElroy is a wilderness survival expert and founder of Wild Survival who has taught primitive skills to more than 15,000 students worldwide, including elite military groups. He holds a BA in Anthropology from Rutgers and a Master's from the University of Connecticut, and is a nationally certified Wilderness EMT. He appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Argentina-set episode in 2014.

name: Tom Touw
bio: Tom Touw is a defense contractor and military officer who was born in the Netherlands and raised in Arizona, with deployments to Kosovo, Bosnia, Afghanistan and Iraq. He appeared as a survivalist in the Cambodia-set third season of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2014.

name: Tommy Brown
bio: Tommy Brown is a firefighter and military veteran from Tuscaloosa, Alabama. He appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2019 episode {{ep:Meltdown on the Mountain}}, where he was dropped into a high-altitude jungle in Colombia and faced territorial pumas and venomous fer-de-lance snakes.

name: Tony Wheeler
bio: Tony Wheeler is a U.S. Army Green Beret originally from rural Georgia who now lives in Pocatello, Idaho. He and partner Star Torres became the first couple to compete together on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, spending 21 days in the Guyana jungle in the 2019 episode {{ep:For Better or for a Lot Worse}}, where Wheeler proposed at the end of the challenge.

name: Tori Huggins
bio: Tori Huggins is a rookie survivalist who appeared on Season 19 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2026 episode {{ep:Clash of the Survivalists}}. She was dropped into the Florida Everglades alongside franchise legend Matt Wright and returning challenger Cole Wilks, contending with severe storms, relentless mosquitoes and alligators.

name: Tray Heinke
bio: Tray Heinke is a longtime Indiana caver who has explored Binkley Cave, the state's longest, including a 2016 trip that left him trapped underground for more than 36 hours. He has appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, including the 2025 episode {{ep:Toxic Redemption}}.

name: Trent Nielsen
bio: Trent Nielsen is a real estate agent, speaker, and corporate trainer from North Ogden, Utah. He has competed on multiple seasons of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, including a 40-day stretch in South Africa's Selati Basin during which he contracted malaria. He has also appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}.

name: Trenton Harper
bio: Trenton Harper is a paramedic based in Missoula, Montana, originally from rural West Virginia, where his love of the mountains sparked an early interest in traditional living skills. He built his first bow-drill fire at age 15 and earned one of the highest PSR ratings on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, surviving 21 days in the peaks of Udhampur, India, in the 2015 episode {{ep:Fire on the Mountain}}.

name: Trevor Rasmussen
bio: Trevor Rasmussen, known online as "Fronkey," is a YouTuber born in Miami, Florida. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2017 episode {{ep:Rain of Terror}}, attempting a 21-day challenge in the cloud forests of Ecuador before tapping out due to a machete-cut finger that became badly infected.

name: Trish Bulinsky
bio: Trish Bulinsky is a survivalist originally from Port Monmouth, New Jersey who now lives in North Carolina. She grew up camping in the backwoods of Virginia and Pennsylvania with her father, and has competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}, including a 2019 21-day challenge in the Amazon rainforest.

name: Viktor Kuhn
bio: Viktor Kuhn is a paramedic from Centurion, South Africa who has worked as a remote-site medic for many years. After working behind the scenes on the show for several seasons, he competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2023 episode {{ep:Taste of Their Own Medicine}}, surviving the jungles of Guyana with partner Janis Holcombe and becoming the first South African to win the challenge.

name: Vincent Pinto
bio: Vincent Pinto is a naturalist, ethnobotanist, wildlife biologist and wilderness-survival instructor who founded Ravens-Way Wild Journeys in Patagonia, Arizona in 1993. He competed on Season 2 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Bolivian jungle, departing on day 18 and later being diagnosed with three tropical diseases including falciparum malaria.

name: Warrick Harvey
bio: Warrick Harvey is a South African bowyer who runs Harvey Archery, where he handcrafts traditional bows and knives. He competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2022 in a challenge filmed in Zambia, and has since appeared alongside his brother Shaun in the episode {{ep:Sibling Survival}}.

name: Waylon Harper
bio: Waylon Harper is the young-adult son of veteran {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist Wes Harper and a graduate of Appalachian State University. He followed his father onto the show in the 2022 episode {{ep:Next Gen Survival}}, taking on a 14-day challenge in a dense Mexican rainforest filled with pumas, jaguars and fer-de-lance snakes.

name: Waz Addy
bio: Waz Addy is an Australian-American military veteran, former pro rugby player and ex-detective senior constable now based in Kansas City, Missouri. He has competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and won the $100,000 grand prize on Season 3 of {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}} in 2023.

name: Wes Adams
bio: Wes Adams is a college professor at Northeast Lakeview College in San Antonio, Texas. He first appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2017 and has returned for additional challenges to prove he can outlast his earlier run.

name: Wes Harper
bio: Wes Harper is a survivalist, entrepreneur and television personality born in Washington, D.C. and raised in Northern Virginia, who co-founded the Raleigh-based IT firm LightWire, Inc. in 1996. He has competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}, with challenges in Brazil, South Africa and Ecuador. He is a father of five and a prostate-cancer survivor.

name: Wes Heustess
bio: Wes Heustess, who goes by "Wesley of the Wild," is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2018 episode {{ep:Love at First Fight}}. He teamed with Leah McCabe and James Lewis in Nicaragua's Isla Zapatera jungle but tapped out after four days.

name: Whitney Hamblin
bio: Whitney Hamblin is a Westfield High School (Indiana) alumna who thru-hiked the Appalachian Trail from Georgia to Maine in 2016, which led Discovery producers to recruit her for the show. She competed on Season 10 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2019 episode {{ep:Frozen and Afraid}}, surviving the full 21-day challenge in a Brazilian jungle with partner Nathan Martinez.

name: William Jay Kennedy Jr
bio: Bill Kennedy is a Greenville, Pennsylvania native who now lives in the Pittsburgh area, with a Cub Scout and Boy Scout background dating to his time at Greenville High School. He appeared on Season 18 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Beauty and the Bro}}, where he was paired with Jolie Laroux and focused on mastering the bow-drill fire technique.

name: William Lee Barnett
bio: William Lee Barnett is a U.S. military veteran who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2025 episode {{ep:The Serpent's Cove}}, taking on a 21-day challenge in the Philippine jungle while battling a crippling fear of snakes.

name: Zach Benton
bio: Zach Benton is a former U.S. Marine Scout Sniper and firefighter who now works as a rifle instructor at the FTW Ranch in Texas. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2022 episode {{ep:Haunted and Hungry}}, completing 17 days of the 21-day challenge solo after his partner tapped out on day four.

name: Zack Buck
bio: Zack Buck is a Chesterfield, Missouri native and Southeast Missouri State University outdoor-recreation alumnus who has led wilderness treks in Utah for at-risk youth. He competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2015 episode {{ep:Edge of Madness}}, surviving 21 days in Guyana and earning a PSR of 8.1 after his partner left on day six.
